content_body:
When planning a summer vacation, a few variables insert themselves into the conversation. Europe might be too expensive and a large travel commitment, Florida beaches might be crowded, the Rockies might be a bit far from the Southeastern region, etc. If you are in search of a travel destination praised for its breathtaking scenery, variety of activities, and accessible lodging, look no further than the hidden gem of Blue Ridge, GA.

Just 2 hours north of Atlanta, Blue Ridge is nestled at the terminus of the Appalachian Trail, and its summers offer warm, pleasant days in the 80s with evenings in the high 60s. The mountain ranges bring cool breezes which shield the area from sticky humidity, so exploring the outdoors is not a suffocating experience!

How does one plan a cabin getaway in Georgia? With local expertise and two decades of experience, our team at Cabin Rentals of Georgia is ready to offer you hand-picked lodging suggestions from our portfolio as well as the best activity recommendations to make your summer vacation the most special one yet. You can trust that we have done the legwork of finding the best of Blue Ridge for you because of our hands-on experience.

When choosing a luxury Blue Ridge cabin rental, one must consider the size of the home, the amenities it offers, and its proximity to downtown Blue Ridge. This can be an overwhelming undertaking when scanning listing websites for the perfect vacation rental. But have no fear! Below we highlight the best Blue Ridge cabins for a summer vacation. Whether traveling with kids or looking for the perfect couples getaway, Cabin Rentals of Georgia has you covered with top-of-the-line accommodations.

1. Aska Escape Lodge

For adventure enthusiasts and families with kids, Aska Escape Lodge is a dream come true. Situated in the heart of the Aska Adventure Area, this luxury cabin in the woods provides easy access to some of the best activities in Blue Ridge.

Key Features

  • Prime Location: Located near popular hiking trails like Fall Branch Falls, tubing the Toccoa River, minutes from downtown, and walking distance to gem mining and fishing at the Lilly Pad Village.
  • Spacious Accommodations: Boasts 3 King/Queen Suites and spacious living both inside and out, making it the perfect haven for families or couples.
  • Game Room: Equipped with a pool table, arcade machine, and a myriad of board games, ensuring fun for all ages, even on rainy days.
  • Hot Tub: After a day of exploring, unwind in the hot tub or by the outdoor fireplaces while enjoying the blinking lightning bugs and scenic views.

Why It's Great for Summer

The prime location to outdoor adventures means you can easily spend your days hiking, fishing, or tubing. The large decks and hot tub provide excellent spots to relax and enjoy the warm summer evenings.

2. Creekside Green

Creekside Green is ideal for those who want to enjoy a waterfront paradise, situated on Fightingtown Creek and nearby activities like horseback riding, zip lining, wineries, and more.

Key Features

  • Creekside Location: Just steps away from the creek, perfect for swimming and fishing.
  • Rustic Charm: Traditional cabin decor with modern comforts like window walls looking over the water. Enjoy board games indoors and corn hole outside!
  • Outdoor Fire Pit: The custom stone fire pit is perfect for evening gatherings under the stars and making s'mores.
  • Spacious Decks: The front porch boasts a daybed swing and conversational seating, while the back decks offer two al fresco dining tables, both overlooking the water.

Why It's Great for Summer

Creekside Green is an idyllic oasis, providing outdoor amenities that are second to none. The cozy interior and Smart TV are perfect for movie nights while the decks are excellent spots for listening to the soothing sounds of nature.

3. Above the Timberline

Above the Timberline offers breathtaking views of the Blue Ridge Mountains, making it a top choice for those who appreciate a lovely view. Its custom-built design and interior touches add that luxury finish to this 4b/3.5b.

Key Features

  • King Bedrooms: Enjoy 4 King bedrooms throughout this spacious home, perfect for couples and adult families.
  • Window Walls: Whether you are cozied up in front of the fireplace on the main floor or terrace level, revel in the floor-to-ceiling window walls overlooking the North Georgia Mountains.
  • Quintessential Outdoor Living: Enjoy an outdoor fireplace, fire pit, al fresco dining, comfortable seating, and a hot tub on the porches of Above the Timberline. This Blue Ridge vacation rental epitomizes bringing luxury to the outdoors.
  • Ultimate Game Room: Enjoy a gas fireplace, Smart TV, arcade machine, board games, pool table, wet bar, and wine fridge in this decked-out game room. Perfect for evenings full of laughs and quality time.

Why It's Great for Summer

The elevated location provides cooler temperatures and stunning views throughout the day, and the many outdoor amenities make Above the Timberline perfect for summer fun.

4. High Hopes

High Hopes is a charming and cozy option, perfect for a romantic getaway or a small family vacation. Its paved location and nearby Toccoa River access make it a lovely option for your long weekend away.

Key Features

  • Charming Decor: Rustic yet elegant interiors that create a warm and inviting atmosphere.
  • Four Suites: High Hopes boasts four King/Queen suites, perfect for the adults traveling together who value privacy.
  • Outdoor Hot Tub: A private hot tub set among the trees, complete with fire pit and picnic table.
  • Proximity to Activities: Close to whitewater rafting, ziplining, Mercier Orchards, and more, High Hopes is perfect for those who prioritize easy access to the best of Blue Ridge.

Why It's Great for Summer

The prime location of High Hopes is perfect for those who want to balance sight-seeing with relaxing. The intimate atmosphere makes it a perfect retreat for couples.

5. Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek

Cherokee Sunrise offers a perfect blend of rustic charm and modern comfort. This renovated farmhouse is ideal for those seeking a peaceful fishing retreat without sacrificing convenience.

Key Features

  • Secluded Location: Nestled on 25 acres in the Aska Adventure Area, providing privacy and tranquility.
  • Modern Amenities: Includes a fully equipped kitchen, indoor and outdoor Smart TVs, hi-speed Wi-Fi, and pool table.
  • Fire Pit: The perfect feature for summer nights spent roasting marshmallows and storytelling. Its secluded location means that the stargazing is second to none.
  • Prime Fishing Access: Enjoy complimentary fishing from the pond teeming with bass in the front yard and 200' of Noontootla Creek in front of the gazebo. The remaining 1/2 mile of Noontootla Creek is managed by our fly-fishing partner, North GA Trout Fishing. Reach out to them for a private guided experience!

Why It's Great for Summer

The rich history of the cabin and the land allows guests to mix local culture with a luxury vacation. The affordable rates and prime fishing access are perfect for those looking for a quiet getaway in nature.

Concluding Thoughts

Make this year's summer vacation one to remember at your own private luxury cabin in Blue Ridge, GA. From boating on Lake Blue Ridge to waterfall hikes and shopping in downtown Blue Ridge to ziplining through the national forest, there's something for everyone here. Start planning your Blue Ridge experience today and secure one of our luxury cabins for your dates! Book online or over the phone at (706) 432-2140 and don't forget to use code SUM243 for the 3rd night free at these stunning vacation rentals.
title: The Best Blue Ridge Cabins for a Summer Vacation
